name: Science Fiction
description: Futuristic concepts, advanced technology, and space exploration.

name: Fantasy
description: Magical elements, mythical creatures, and imaginary worlds.

name: Mystery & Thriller
description: Suspenseful stories involving crimes and investigations.

name: Historical Fiction
description: Fictional stories set against the backdrop of real historical events.

name: Literary Fiction
description: Character-driven stories focusing on human condition and style.

name: Romance
description: Stories focused on romantic relationships and love.

name: Horror
description: Fiction designed to scare, startle, and thrill the reader.

name: Non-Fiction
description: Factual literature based on real events and facts.

name: Biography & Autobiography
description: Detailed accounts of a person's life.

name: Self-Help
description: Books intended to assist individuals in personal improvement.

name: Philosophy
description: Exploration of fundamental questions about existence, reason, and values.

name: Psychology
description: Study of the human mind, behavior, and mental processes.

name: History
description: Chronological records of past events and civilizations.

name: Science & Nature
description: Exploration of natural phenomena, physics, biology, and chemistry.

name: Business & Economics
description: Insights on finance, management, and corporate strategies.

name: Poetry
description: Literary work expressing feelings and ideas with distinct style and rhythm.

name: Drama & Plays
description: Theatrical scripts meant to be performed on stage.

name: Children's Books
description: Literature designed specifically for young readers.

name: Young Adult (YA)
description: Novels targeted at teenagers and young adults.

name: Religion & Spirituality
description: Exploration of faith, theology, and spiritual practices.

name: Art & Photography
description: Visual arts, history of art, and photographic collections.
